Test Steps: 1. Open App. 2. Navigate to Booking. 3. Select a valid future slot. 4. Click 'Book Now'. 5. Confirm booking.
Expected Result: Appointment booked successfully; confirmation message displayed.

Test Scenario: Edge Case: Booking for a past date
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Booking. 2. Attempt to select a date in the past.
Expected Result: Date is disabled or error message shown.

Test Scenario: Edge Case: Booking for a slot already taken
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Booking. 2. Select a slot. 3. Wait for another session to book the same slot. 4. Click 'Book Now'.
Expected Result: Error: 'Slot already taken; please choose another'.

Test Steps: 1. Both users select same slot. 2. Both click 'Book Now' simultaneously.
Expected Result: Only one succeeds; second receives conflict error.

Pre-requisites: New user with no health history
Expected Result: Prompted to complete profile before booking.

Test Steps: 1. Verify blue/white color palette. 2. Verify 'Book Now' button visibility. 3. Check glassmorphism effects.
1. Open booking screen on different screen sizes.
Expected Result: Layout remains clean and card-based on all screens.
System handles only first request; no multiple bookings.

Test Steps: 1. Click 'Book Now'. 2. Disconnect network before confirmation.
Expected Result: App handles timeout gracefully and offers retry.

Test Steps: 1. Submit booking request. 2. Inspect network traffic.
Expected Result: Patient data is encrypted (HTTPS/TLS) during transit.

Test Steps: 1. Attempt to book a slot 1 year in advance.
Expected Result: System allows booking within clinic-set limit (e.g. 3 months).

Test Steps: 1. Change device timezone. 2. Open booking screen.
Expected Result: Slots display correctly according to local/clinic time.
Booking removed; slot returned to availability.

Test Steps: 1. Attempt to reach booking screen in <3 clicks.
Expected Result: Booking reachable from Home via clear navigation bar.

Test Scenario: Edge Case: Special characters in comments (if applicable)
Test Steps: 1. Add comments with emojis/symbols. 2. Click 'Book Now'.
Expected Result: Booking persists correctly with special characters.
